title: Lemon Lime White Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions:
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking soda and salt.
In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugars with a mixer until light in color. Add the egg and beat until blended.
Add the lemon zest, lime zest and vanilla. Mix to combine.
Add the dry ingredients in small batches; after the dry ingredients have been mixed in, add the white chocolate chips.
Place the cookie batter on the cookie sheet using about a tablespoon per cookie.
Bake for about 9 minutes or until light golden in color.
